name: KeyUsage
description: KeyUsage schema from Censys Platform API

certificate_sign.description: Whether the keyCertSign bit is set.

content_commitment.description: Whether the contentCommitment (formerly called nonRepudiation) bit is set.

crl_sign.description: Whether the cRLSign bit is set.

data_encipherment.description: Whether the dataEncipherment bit is set.

decipher_only.description: Whether the decipherOnly bit is set.

digital_signature.description: Whether the digitalSignature bit is set.

encipher_only.description: Whether the encipherOnly bit is set.

key_agreement.description: Whether the keyAgreement bit is set.

key_encipherment.description: Whether the keyEncipherment bit is set.

value.description: The integer value of the bitmask in the extension.
